judgment.summary: Dominant, rapidly growing AI chip provider with exceptional margins and strong cash flow, trading at a premium but supported by high growth expectations.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 5.5%; next earnings date is 2026-05-20.
positives: Revenue growth 73.2% YoY and Earnings growth 95.6% YoY demonstrate immense top and bottom-line expansion.
Gross margin 71.1%, Operating margin 65.0%, and Profit margin 55.6% are industry-leading, showcasing pricing power and efficiency.
Return on Equity 101.5% and Return on Assets 51.2% indicate highly effective capital utilization.
Free cash flow $58.13B TTM and $62.56B cash provide significant financial flexibility.
Forward P/E 18.82x and PEG ratio 0.71x suggest growth is priced in but still offers value relative to its growth rate.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 7.25 is high, though offset by substantial cash and debt levels.
Beta of 2.24 indicates higher volatility compared to the broader market.
Price/Sales (TTM) of 24.59 is very high, reflecting significant market expectations.
Dividend yield is 0.0%, offering no income return to shareholders.

news.paragraph: NVIDIA is seeing positive developments with a partnership with Fortinet aimed at securing AI data in real-time, alongside news of its H200 chip receiving clearance for the Chinese market. These developments suggest ongoing strategic expansion and market access, potentially bolstering demand for its AI-focused hardware. Traders should monitor any commentary around the impact of these events on future sales and competitive positioning.

headlines.title: NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) Partners with Fortinet to Secure AI Data in Real Time
NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) Gains Momentum on H200 China Clearance
